films.title: Scream VI
films.overview: Following the latest Ghostface killings, the four survivors leave Woodsboro behind and start a fresh chapter.

films.title: Studio 666
films.overview: Legendary rock band Foo Fighters move into an Encino mansion steeped in grisly rock and roll history to record their much anticipated 10th album. Once in the house, Dave Grohl finds himself grappling with supernatural forces that threaten both the completion of the album and the lives of the band.

films.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
films.overview: After a family tragedy, three generations of the Deetz family return home to Winter River. Still haunted by Betelgeuse, Lydia's life is turned upside down when her teenage daughter, Astrid, accidentally opens the portal to the Afterlife.

films.title: Death of a Unicorn
films.overview: A father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to a weekend retreat, where his billionaire boss seeks to exploit the creature’s miraculous curative properties.

films.title: Finestkind
films.overview: Two brothers from opposite sides of the tracks are reunited as adults. Desperate circumstances force them into a deal with an organized crime syndicate in Boston, and a young woman gets caught in the middle.

films.title: American Carnage
films.overview: After a governor issues an executive order to arrest the children of undocumented immigrants, the detained youth are offered an opportunity to have their charges dropped by volunteering to provide care to the elderly. Once inside the elder care facility, however, they discover more twisted secrets than they could have possibly imagined.

films.title: Miller's Girl
films.overview: A talented young writer embarks on a creative odyssey when her teacher assigns a project that entangles them both.

films.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall
films.overview: Remi and Barnes, two very different teenagers, meet by chance in the winter of their senior year, then spend four  days together over the course of a year that will change their lives forever.

films.title: The Babysitter: Killer Queen
films.overview: Two years after defeating a satanic cult led by his babysitter Bee, Cole's trying to forget his past and focus on surviving high school. But when old enemies unexpectedly return, Cole will once again have to outsmart the forces of evil.

films.title: YES DAY
films.overview: A mom and dad who usually say no decide to say yes to their kids' wildest requests — with a few ground rules — on a whirlwind day of fun and adventure.

films.title: Scream
films.overview: Twenty-five years after a streak of brutal murders shocked the quiet town of Woodsboro, a new killer has donned the Ghostface mask and begins targeting a group of teenagers to resurrect secrets from the town’s deadly past.

films.title: X
films.overview: In 1979, a group of young filmmakers set out to make an adult film in rural Texas, but when their reclusive, elderly hosts catch them in the act, the cast find themselves fighting for their lives.

films.title: The Fallout
films.overview: In the wake of a school tragedy, Vada, Mia and Quinton form a unique and dynamic bond as they navigate the never linear, often confusing journey to heal in a world that feels forever changed.
